steps.title: Clear fractions
steps.content: Multiply both sides by $76cx$ to remove denominators: $$76=cx^{2}+76x \implies cx^{2}+76x-76=0.$$

steps.title: Apply the one-solution condition
steps.content: For exactly one solution, the discriminant is $0$: $76^{2}-4(c)(-76)=0$, so $5776+304c=0$ and $c=-19$. The answer is -19.
